de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

Class SideProofStore

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util.SideProofStore

  • public final class SideProofStore
extends Object

    The only instance of this class DEFAULT_INSTANCE is used to manage performed side proofs.

    Side proofs are added via #disposeOrStore(String, ApplyStrategyInfo) when they are no longer needed. If the SideProofStore is enabled (isEnabled()) the side Proof is not disposed; instead it is added via addProof(String, Proof) and available for a later access until it is removed via removeEntries(Collection).

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      Nested Classes

      • isEnabled

        public boolean isEnabled()
        Checks if the SideProofStore is enabled or not.
        Returns:
        true enabled, false disabled.

        true SideProofStore.Entry for Proof exist, false otherwise.

        public SideProofStore.Entry getEntry(Proof proof)
        Returns the SideProofStore.Entry for the given Proof.

        Returns:
        true SideProofStore.Entry is contained, false SideProofStore.Entry is not contained.
